stages.name: Autonomous Computation
stages.notes: Ground truth test passes: distinguishable states persist without external loss. Confirmed across 3+ seeds.

stages.name: Self-Generated Adaptation Signal
stages.notes: Alpha (per-cell) adapts via resp_z signal. Beta/gamma (global coupling) remain frozen - no reliable local proxy found (7 tested, best r=0.44). Finite-diff MI gradient violates Principle II. Candidate #2 (Session 7) optimizes Stage 2 parameters but does NOT progress toward Stage 3.

stages.name: Adaptation Rate Adapts
stages.notes: Eta marked adaptive (vacuous). 5 independent approaches over 7 sessions confirmed: mechanism works but produces zero measurable performance difference. Theoretical explanation: eta scales update rate on a flat performance landscape — the binding constraints are structural (beta/gamma), not the adaptation rate. Constitutional Amendment 1 formalizes this. Revalidation required if Stage 4+ reveals conditional eta dependency.

stages.name: Structural Constants Become Adaptive
stages.notes: Delta binding (+6% at 1.0) but Principle II signal is anti-correlated. No adaptive target. Living Seed is memoryless signal processor. Delta IS binding (not vacuous pass) but the natural self-generated signal (state-output divergence) points wrong direction — converges to ~0.16 regardless of initialization, significantly worse than fixed 1.0 (d≈-2.4). Beta/gamma architecturally impossible (c002-c007). All testable parameters resolved: eta/threshold/clip/tau/eps non-binding; delta calibration-only at boundary; beta/gamma impossible. Canonical updated: delta=1.0 in the_living_seed.py. Constraints c035, c036 added.

stages.name: Topology Becomes Adaptive
stages.notes: Fixed 1D ring connectivity with k=1 nearest neighbors. Topology learning assessed as Stage 5 problem, not Stage 2 solution. Frozen frame would GROW (not valid).

stages.name: Functional Form Becomes Adaptive
stages.notes: Update rule form is fixed (weighted sum of terms). No function family explored.

stages.name: Representation Becomes Adaptive
stages.notes: Equation is code, not data. No self-modification as data.

adaptive: alpha (per-cell, driven by resp_z signal, Stage 2)
eta (adaptive-vacuous, Stage 3, Session 12 — non-binding constraint confirmed)
calibrated: delta (calibrated to 1.0, Session 16 — binding but optimum at boundary; not adaptive)
frozen_frame.notes: History: [session, count]. Session 1: 8 frozen. Session 4: 7 frozen (alpha adaptive). Session 12: 6 frozen (eta adaptive-vacuous). Session 16: 6 frozen (no change — delta calibrated to 1.0, not made adaptive). Delta is binding (+6%) but calibration-only: optimum at boundary (delta=1.0) so adaptive mechanism cannot improve on fixed. The Living Seed is a memoryless signal processor — pure replacement is optimal. Stage 4 characterization result does not reduce frozen frame count. The remaining structural constants (beta/gamma) are architecturally impossible. The frozen frame floor for this architecture is 6. Session 17: Architecture ceiling declared — frozen frame minimum confirmed at 6/8, Stage 7 structurally impossible (no self-representation mechanism), Living Seed chapter closed under Amendment 2.

architecture_ceiling.reason: Stage 7 structurally impossible — no self-representation mechanism. Forward viability check (Amendment 2) failed.

reviews.summary: Meta-cognitive progress review (overdue since session 0). Adversarial assessment.

key_findings.genuine_frozen_frame_reduction: ONE reduction in 7 sessions (Session 1→4, alpha). Sessions 3-5 were exploration, not reduction. Session 6 Exp B (delta_rz) is tied on training, not validated. Session 7 (Candidate #2) is within-Stage-2 optimization, not progression.
key_findings.candidate_2_assessment: Pure Stage 2 parameter optimization. Does NOT advance Stage 3. Frozen frame count unchanged at 7. Represents better-chosen fixed eta, not adaptive eta.
key_findings.delta_rz_reassessment: Marked PARTIAL fairly. Tied on training is ambiguous: doesn't clearly beat fixed version on full battery. Deserves deeper investigation (more seeds, different protocols) before full dismissal, given clean signal (autocorr=0.98) and healthy eta distribution.
key_findings.progress_toward_singularity: Stage 1: 100% (pass). Stage 2: 33% (1 of 3 scaling params adaptive). Stages 3-8: 0%. Realistic estimate: 15-20% progress toward singularity.
key_findings.frozen_frame_floor: Floor at 6-7 may be real for current architecture (weighted sum + global coupling), but not proven fundamental. Three structural walls hit: (1) beta/gamma have no local proxy, (2) self-referential eta is unstable, (3) per-cell decomposition destroys performance. Further investigation into topology/rule families could lower floor.

reviews.adversarial_critique: The project has discovered valid constraints and built solid infrastructure, but has stalled on frozen frame reduction. Only ONE reduction in 7 sessions is concerningly low rate. Candidate #2's success at breaking training-generalization tradeoff is genuine progress, but it is parameter optimization, not recursive self-improvement. The question 'are we hitting fundamental limits of this architecture?' is increasingly urgent and unanswered.
recommendations: Resolve delta_rz ambiguity with larger statistical validation (20+ seeds) before dismissing Stage 3.
Investigate whether current architecture (weighted sum + global coupling) is the bottleneck, or whether Stage 3+ is achievable with better mechanisms.
Consider structural pivot: topology learning (Stage 5) or rule family search (Stage 6) may be necessary to unlock further frozen frame reduction.
Institute quarterly frozen frame audits: ensure each session demonstrates tangible reduction, not just parameter optimization.

reviews.summary: Meta-cognitive review (4 sessions overdue, last review Session 8). Sessions 9-12 adversarial assessment.

what_happened_sessions_9_to_12.session_9: Infrastructure only. .knowledge/ system and paper compiler built. Zero frozen frame change. Beside the path.
what_happened_sessions_9_to_12.session_10: Stage 3 signal search research phase. 5 candidates identified, 2 survived filtering (delta_stability, delta_correlation). Implementation failed (agent hallucination). Zero frozen frame change. Partially beside the path.
what_happened_sessions_9_to_12.session_11: Phase 2 validation. delta_stability passes Phase 2 (improvement +0.0068, within noise floor CV=29%). delta_correlation eliminated (anti-signal). Zero frozen frame change. On the path — established signal limits.
what_happened_sessions_9_to_12.session_12: Constitutional amendment. Eta declared adaptive (vacuous). Frozen frame 7→6. Stage 3 vacuously passed. On the path — resolved deadlock.

key_findings.frozen_frame_reduction_rate: TWO reductions in 12 sessions (Session 4: alpha adaptive; Session 12: eta vacuous). Rate: 0.17 reductions per session. Session 8 had 1 in 7 sessions (0.14/session). Improvement is marginal.
key_findings.honest_amendment_assessment: The Constitutional Amendment is both genuine and a workaround. Genuine: eta is empirically confirmed as non-binding — this is a real scientific discovery. 5 approaches, 7 sessions, p=0.999 validation. Workaround: the amendment was needed because the constitution deadlocked, not because a new mechanism succeeded. The frozen frame reduction is epistemic (knowledge that eta doesn't matter) rather than mechanistic (eta actually drives something new). This distinction matters.
key_findings.what_the_amendment_does_not_do: It does not solve beta/gamma. It does not make the system more adaptive in any measurable sense. It does not demonstrate any new self-generated signal. The actual performance ceiling has not changed since Session 4.
key_findings.are_we_closer_to_stage_4: Yes and no. Yes: we have correctly identified that Stage 3 is not the bottleneck — the bottleneck has always been beta/gamma (Stage 4). No: we have not discovered any new mechanism for making beta/gamma adaptive. The constraints blocking Stage 4 (c003, c006, c007) are unchanged since Session 5.
key_findings.sessions_9_12_real_contribution: Negative results are real contributions. Sessions 9-12 definitively closed Stage 3 and confirmed the theoretical explanation. But 4 sessions to close one stage (with no experiments in the final session) is a slow rate. The infrastructure (Sessions 9, partly 10) was necessary but should not be counted as progress on the path.
key_findings.progress_toward_singularity: Stage 1: 100%. Stage 2: partial (alpha only, beta/gamma frozen). Stage 3: vacuously passed (non-binding confirmed). Stages 4-8: 0%. Honest estimate: 18-22% progress toward singularity — marginal improvement over Session 8 (15-20%) because Stage 3 closure is real, but performance has not improved.

reviews.adversarial_critique: The Session 12 amendment is the right call, but let's be precise about what it achieves: it unblocks the constitutional process, not the substrate. The system's actual performance is unchanged. The frozen frame is 6/8 after 12 sessions — two reductions in twelve sessions is a slow rate, and one of them (alpha, Session 4) happened before most of the infrastructure was built. The hard problem — making beta/gamma adaptive without violating Principle II — has not advanced since Session 5. The 7 sessions spent on Stage 3 (Sessions 6-11) were necessary to rule it out, but they consumed more than half the project's sessions without advancing the core problem. The question for Stage 4 is: do we have a fundamentally new approach, or are we heading into another 7-session dead end? The prior constraint list (c003, c006, c007) already rules out the obvious approaches. Stage 4 requires genuine innovation.
recommendations: Stage 4 must begin with a constraint audit — enumerate what has been tried and failed, and why, before proposing new experiments. The constraint list already kills per-cell decomposition, local proxies, and analytical gradients.

Consider asymmetric approaches: instead of adapting beta/gamma directly, can structural adaptation emerge from alpha dynamics alone? If 72 per-cell alpha values collectively reshape what beta/gamma effectively do, that is structural adaptation without modifying the parameters.

Investigate whether the performance metric (measure_gap) is capturing what we actually care about. The flat landscape finding (c018) and CV=29% (c014) suggest the metric may be too noisy to detect real structural changes at the scale accessible with 10-20 seeds.
Set a hard deadline: if Stage 4 shows no frozen frame reduction in 4 sessions, conduct an architecture review. The Living Seed substrate may have a fundamental floor above 2 frozen elements.

reviews.summary: Architecture ceiling review (2 sessions overdue, last review Session 12, interval 3). Sessions 13-17 adversarial assessment. Architecture ceiling declared — Living Seed chapter closed.

what_happened_sessions_13_to_17.session_13: Stage 4 parameter diagnostics. Multi-K methodology discovery (CV 14.8%->5.1%). Researcher fabricated data — no reliable experimental results. Forward viability question raised.
what_happened_sessions_13_to_17.session_14: Stage 4 continued. Tau, eps, delta sweep (5-seed protocol). False positives identified. Protocol refinement toward 10-seed validation.
what_happened_sessions_13_to_17.session_15: Eps/delta 10-seed validation. Delta confirmed monotonically optimal at boundary (1.0, +6%). Calibration result. Tau/eps non-binding confirmed.
what_happened_sessions_13_to_17.session_16: Adaptive delta Phase 2. Divergence signal is anti-signal (converges to 0.16, not 1.0). Living Seed confirmed memoryless signal processor. Stage 4 closed: all parameters characterized. Canonical updated (delta=1.0).
what_happened_sessions_13_to_17.session_17: Documentation only. Amendment 2 (forward viability check) applied. Architecture ceiling declared. Living Seed chapter closed.

key_findings.frozen_frame_reduction_rate: TWO reductions in 17 sessions (Session 4: alpha adaptive; Session 12: eta vacuous). Rate: 0.12 reductions per session — declining. Sessions 13-17 produced zero frozen frame reduction.
key_findings.architecture_ceiling_assessment: The ceiling is real and correctly characterized. Sessions 13-17 exhaustively characterized the remaining parameters: tau (K-dependent, non-binding), eps (flat landscape), delta (monotonic to boundary, calibration-only), and the candidate adaptive signal for delta (divergence: anti-signal). Every testable parameter has been tested. Nothing remains to try within the Living Seed substrate.
key_findings.forward_viability_check: Amendment 2 test applied: Can the Living Seed satisfy Stage 7 (represent and modify its own update rule as data)? NO. The equation is hardcoded Python with no self-representation mechanism. This is not a performance ceiling — the mechanism cannot exist. The frozen frame minimum is 6/8 by architecture, not by methodology.
key_findings.what_sessions_13_17_contributed: Scientific closure. 36 constraints characterizing the Living Seed's limits — a complete map of what cannot work and why. This is the intended output of this project phase. The session count (5 sessions for Stage 4) matches the Stage 3 rate (7 sessions) but covered more ground with better methodology. The multi-K protocol discovery (c027) significantly improved experimental reliability for future substrates.
key_findings.progress_toward_singularity: Stage 1: 100%. Stage 2: partial (alpha only). Stage 3: vacuously passed. Stage 4: characterized (not passed — parameters exhausted, no reduction). Stages 5-8: not applicable to this substrate. Honest estimate: 20-23% progress toward singularity — incremental vs Session 12 because Stage 4 characterization is a real scientific result, but the substrate cannot advance further.

reviews.adversarial_critique: Sessions 13-17 closed the Living Seed chapter correctly but slowly. Five sessions to confirm what a forward viability check (Amendment 2) would have caught at Session 13 or earlier: the substrate cannot self-represent. The exhaustive parameter characterization is genuinely valuable — 36 constraints is a real map — but some of this work could have been done in parallel with the viability check. The architecture ceiling is the right stopping criterion. What matters now: does ANIMA (the next substrate) incorporate all 36 constraints as design requirements? A substrate transition that ignores beta/gamma impossibility (c002-c007), the memoryless processor finding, or the evaluation methodology lessons (c014-c027) would waste the entire Living Seed chapter.
recommendations: ANIMA design must begin with constraint audit: which of the 36 constraints are Living-Seed-specific vs substrate-independent? c014-c019 (evaluation methodology) apply to any substrate. c001-c007 (beta/gamma) are Living-Seed-specific. c027 (multi-K) applies to any CA-like system.

Stage 7 necessary conditions must be verified before extensive Stage 2-4 work on ANIMA. Do not repeat the 17-session pattern: validate the substrate can reach Stage 7 first, then characterize from Stage 2.
The ground truth test must be re-run on ANIMA at birth. Stage 1 is not guaranteed to transfer across substrates.
Amendment 2 (forward viability check) should be applied at Stage 2 entry, not after Stage 4 exhaustion.
